message:
feat(core): add watchdog_warnings() to WeztermInterface for health snapshots

Introduce a new watchdog_warnings() method on the WeztermInterface trait
that returns backend-specific health warnings for inclusion in runtime
health snapshots. This enables the observation runtime's maintenance loop
and RuntimeHandle::health_snapshot() to surface WezTerm backend health
alongside existing lock-contention and memory telemetry.

wezterm.rs (+40 lines):
  - Add watchdog_warnings() to WeztermInterface trait with a default
    empty-vec implementation for backward compatibility
  - WeztermClient impl inspects circuit breaker state and emits
    warnings when the circuit is half-open or open, including current
    failure count vs threshold
  - Arc<dyn WeztermInterface> delegates to inner impl
  - UnifiedClient delegates to inner impl

sharding.rs (+8 lines):
  - ShardedWeztermClient implements watchdog_warnings() by delegating
    to the existing shard_watchdog_warnings() method, which aggregates
    per-shard health warnings from the shard health report
  - Extend existing test to verify trait-level watchdog_warnings()
    returns the same warnings as the direct method

runtime.rs (+11 lines):
  - Both spawn_maintenance_task() health snapshot path and
    RuntimeHandle::health_snapshot() now call
    wezterm_handle.watchdog_warnings() and extend the warnings vec,
    surfacing backend health state in every health probe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
